entries.definition:
ʾ–s–w/y cure, medicine; to console; sadness; to treat
equally; model, exemplar; pillar. Of this root, two forms occur
seven times in the Qur’an: أَسَى ʾasā four times and أُسْوَة ʾuswatun
three times.

أَسَى ʾasā [v. IV, intrans.] to sorrow, to grieve (7:93) فَكَيْفَ آسَى
عَلَى قَوْمٍ كَافِرِينَ so how can I grieve for a people of disbelievers?

أُسْوَة ʾuswatun [n.] model, exemplar (33:21) لَقَدْ كَانَ لَكُمْ فِي رَسُولِ
اللَّهِ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ you have had in the Messenger of God a good model,
for those who put their hope in God and the Last Day.
